headline: 99°F scorcher — run zone 1 and feed beans early.
weather_notes: Run zone 1 this morning — e1–e4 transplants and c-beds are 3 days dry entering 99°F today and 97°F Monday.
Do all outdoor work before 8 AM — 99°F today through 96°F Tuesday with zero rain closes every afternoon garden window.
Check potato bag moisture daily this week — grow bags dry 2–3× faster than ground beds in sustained 97–99°F heat.

surfaced_tasks.title: Feed c2–c4 bush beans this morning
surfaced_tasks.reason: Overdue by 1 day — 38-day beans with no fertilizer logged; run zone 1 first, then apply fish emulsion before 99°F heat climbs.

suggested_tasks.title: Inspect c1 beans for pod set
suggested_tasks.description: Good Mother Stollard at 63 days with no log since May 13 — check for pod development before Monday's 97°F heat peaks.
